name: Baked Bean Dip
directions: Mix together in baking dish.
Bake at 350° for about 30 minutes.
Serve warm with chips.

name: Bean and Bacon Dip
directions: Heat all ingredients together over medium heat till cheese is melted.
Serve warm with Frito corn chips for dipping.
YUM!

name: Real Simple Bean Soup or Dip
directions: Heat olive oil in medium sized sauce pan.
When oil is warm, add drained fresh salsa to pan and saute for a few minutes to lose the "raw/fresh" element.
Add cans of black beans, refried beans and broth.
Salt and Pepper to taste.
Cook on low/medium heat for approximately 7-10 minutes, till hot. You may want to stir occasionally.
For Soup - Serve in bowls with a dollop of sour cream, cheddar cheese and a sprinkle of cilantro, if desired. For Dip - Serve with chips.

name: Quick Vegetarian Bean Dip
directions: Mix ingredients together, and heat over the stove on low heat, stirring occasionally.
Adjust spices to your taste.
Add hot sauce if using, to taste.
Serve with tortilla chips and sour cream.

similar.name: Real Simple Bean Soup or Dip

name: Layered Taco Dip
directions: In a bowl combine the cream cheese with sour cream, taco seasoning mix and garlic until well mixed.
In a large glass bowl layer the cheese mixture, refried beans, salsa, green onions, black olives, chopped tomatoes, lettuce then the shredded cheese on top.
Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Delicious!

name: Seven-Layer Bean Dip
directions: Stir together refried beans and taco seasoning mix.
Spread mixture on large platter.
Stir together cream cheese and chilies.
Carefully spread over bean mixture.
Top with salsa, lettuce, cheese, olives, and tomato.
Refrigerate until serving time.
Serve with tortilla chips.

name: Easy & Delicious Bean Dip
directions: Chop onion very finely.
Place ground-beef and chopped onion in large frying pan. Brown beef with onion on medium heat until beef is browned through and onion is tender.
Drain oil from beef mixture and discard.
Sprinkle teaspoon garlic salt over beef. Add refried beans, green chiles and water to beef mixture. Depending on the consistencey you want, you can add more water. Stir well.
Cook over medium-low heat for 10 minutes.
While cooking, grate your cheese.
Once the mixture has cooked for 10 minutes, add grated cheese. Stir until cheese is completely melted.
Serve with Fritos (I like Fritos best!) or tortilla chips.

name: 7-Layer Dip
directions: Combine refried beans and taco seasoning mix in small bowl.
Spread bean mixture in 8" square dish.
Top with sour cream, guacamole, cheese, salsa, chiles and green onions.
Can be prepared up to 2 hours ahead and chilled.
Serve with chips.

name: 7 Layer Dip
directions: Combine Beans and seasoning mix in small bowl.
Spread bean mixture in 8-inch-square baking dish.
Top With sour cream, guacamole, cheese, salsa, challis and green onions.
Serve with chips.

name: Vegan Taco Soup
directions: Bring 1 cup of the water to a boil in a small saucepan.
Add the bulgur and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes, or until the water is absorbed.
Heat the oil in a soup pot. Add the onion and sauté over medium heat until translucent.
Add the garlic and bell pepper and continue to sauté, stirring frequently, until all are golden.
Add the remaining ingredients, except the garnishes, plus the cooked bulgur and the remaining 3 cups water.
Bring to a rapid simmer, then lower the heat. Cover and simmer gently for 10 to 15 minutes, then remove from the heat.

Fill a bowl about 2/3 full with soup. Top with grated vegan cheese, shredded lettuce, and diced tomatoes. Line the perimeter of each bowl with several tortilla chips, points facing upward, for a star-shaped effect.

similar.name: Real Simple Bean Soup or Dip

name: Fiesta Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients and place in the Double Dipper unit.
Cover and heat 30 to 60 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Serve with tortilla chips or corn chips.

name: My Favorite Bean Dip
directions: Mix together and heat until cheese melts.  Can serve in crock pot.

name: Easy Party Bean Dip
directions: Combine ingredients in pot.
Simmer for 5 minutes.
Mash beans to desired consistency.

name: Kickin' Mexican Bean Dip
directions: Place poblano in a hot broiler till skin is blistered and charred, then place in a bowl and cover.
Put kidney beans in a blender or food processor and pulse till mashed.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add the butter and melt it, then add the onion and garlic, sauteing until soft (about 6 or 7 minutes).
Stir in the bean mash and tomato sauce, along with salt, pepper, and hot sauce, according to your taste.
Peel, seed, and chop the poblano, and add it to the skillet. Simmer for 10 minutes, then serve hot.

similar.name: Real Simple Bean Soup or Dip
